candidate.completion: send a text before my houseplants start giving relationship advice.
candidate.sentence: i’m lonely, please send a text before my houseplants start giving relationship advice.

evaluation.rationale: A mildly fresh loneliness joke with a clear image, but the turn is more whimsical escalation than clean conceptual reversal. The phrasing is serviceable rather than exact or especially compressed.
